headline: Edison International Wildfire Progress And Policy Stance Shape Valuation Debate
summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) has advanced its wildfire relief compensation program for Eaton Fire victims, distributing over US$650 million. A majority of Eaton Fire claims have moved from processing to accepted compensation offers. The CEO of Edison International publicly addressed California utility policy at the Edison Electric Institute Conference, pushing back on proposals to overhaul utility markets and rates. The company highlighted efforts to limit customer rate increases while...
